basicDetails.schemeName: Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award

schemeSubCategory.value: Education and training grants, fellowship, stipend
schemeSubCategory.label: Education and training grants, fellowship, stipend

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award was established to commemorate the birth centenary of Pujya Shri Mota, the founder of the Hari Om Ashram, Nadiad. It is awarded to an eminent Indian scientist for their innovative and outstanding contributions to the field of Science and Technology. The award comprises a silver plaque, a citation, and a cash prize of ₹4,00,000/-.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - Award Amount: ₹4,00,000/- - Recognition: Silver Plaque and Citation
schemeContent.briefDescription: The Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award was established to commemorate the birth centenary of Pujya Shri Mota, the founder of the Hari Om Ashram, Nadiad. It is awarded to an eminent Indian scientist for their innovative and outstanding contributions to the field of Science and Technology.

children.text: The Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award was established to commemorate the birth centenary of Pujya Shri Mota, the founder of the Hari Om Ashram, Nadiad. It is awarded to an eminent Indian scientist for their innovative and outstanding contributions to the field of Science and Technology. The award comprises a silver plaque, a citation, and a cash prize of ₹4,00,000/-.
Click on "Awards Administered By PRL" and select scheme "Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award"
The candidate downloads the prescribed format of the application form.
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Candidate can email their applications in the prescribed format to: DIRECTOR@PRL.RES.IN with the subject line "Nomination for The Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award".

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The applicant visits the [PRL website](https://www.prl.res.in/prl-eng/) and navigate to the "Opportunities" section. **Step 2:** Click on "Awards Administered By PRL" and select scheme "Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award" **Step 3:** The candidate downloads the prescribed format of the application form. **Step 4:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required). **Step 5:** Candidate can email their applications in the prescribed format to: DIRECTOR@PRL.RES.IN with the subject line "Nomination for The Hari Om Ashram Prerit Senior Scientist Award".

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The nominee should be an Indian citizen. - The nominee should be a scientist. - The nominee's contributions must be in Science and Technology.

children.text: The nominee should be an Indian citizen.
The nominee should be a scientist.
The nominee's contributions must be in Science and Technology.
